assumption_text: The artillery estimate is treated as a lower-bound direct civilian death count, not as a full interval estimate.
rationale: The source wording is explicitly 'at least 25,000 civilians were killed.'

assumption_text: Starvation, cold, disease, and other deprivation mortality remain outside dr_v1_direct even though they dominate overall siege deaths.
rationale: The project definition restricts the baseline DR metric to direct violent deaths only.

assumption_text: The 19 September raid is nested within the broader bombardment episode and is not additive to LENINGRAD_E1 without overlap adjustment.
rationale: Single-day raid victims are part of the broader bombardment toll.
